title: Nomad 30L Travel Backpack
description: A durable, water-resistant 30L backpack perfect for weekend trips. Features a dedicated 15-inch laptop sleeve, padded shoulder straps, and a breathable mesh back panel. Dimensions: 20 x 13 x 8 inches. Weight: 2.5 lbs.
merchant_intent: Sell a high-quality, fully-featured 30-liter travel backpack suitable for tech-savvy travelers taking weekend trips.

title: Running Shoes
merchant_intent: Sell premium athletic running shoes designed for daily joggers and runners.

title: Men's Black Leather Wallet
description: Stay stylish with this beautiful brown synthetic leather wallet. Features 6 card slots and a clear ID window. Designed for everyday use.
merchant_intent: Sell an affordable but stylish men's wallet made of brown synthetic leather for daily casual use.

title: Quantum XF-900
description: XF-900 features a hyper-threaded multi-layer capacitive mesh with an output vector of 45 mV. The sub-assembly integration allows for zero-latency phase shifting in the Q-band spectrum. Manufactured in facility 7B.
merchant_intent: Sell a high-end, zero-latency phase shifting electronic component to industrial tech manufacturers.

title: Aero Lite Weekend Carry-on Suitcase
description: The perfect lightweight suitcase for your weekend getaways. Features omni-directional spinner wheels, a TSA-approved lock, and a sleek hard-shell exterior. Easily fits in the overhead bin of most major airlines.
merchant_intent: Sell a regulation-compatible, lightweight hard-shell carry-on suitcase for frequent airline travelers.
